questions.question: What does God (YHWH) take delight in regarding the person mentioned?
questions.answers: YHWH delights in crushing him (and making him suffer/being sick).

questions.question: What happens if the person makes his soul an offering for sin (asham)?
What happens to the person’s lifespan if he makes his soul an offering for sin?
questions.answers: He will prolong his days (live longer).

questions.question: Whose will/provision will succeed, and in what context?
questions.answers: The will of YHWH will be in his hand, and it will prosper/succeed.
